name: Black Brutdrago
effectText:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner Gemini monsters
Once per turn: You can send 1 Gemini monster from your hand to the GY, then target 1 Spell/Trap your opponent controls; destroy it. When this card is destroyed and sent to the GY: You can target 1 Gemini monster in your GY; Special Summon that target and if you do, it becomes an Effect Monster, and gains its effect.
